arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Gent Conference League clash predicted as unlikely goalscoring hero emerges
arts.sum: Chelsea will be looking to continue their winning form of late when they host Belgian side Gent in their UEFA Conference League opener later tonight. Cole Palmer scored all four goals for Enzo Maresca's side, and victory tonight would be a fifth win in a row across all competitions.
